2. the sprinter's efficiency is also evaluated by their ability to maintain a certain average speed, which is defined as the total distance covered divided by the time taken. find the average speed of the sprinter from t = 0 to t = 5 seconds, expressed in terms of the constants a, b, c, and d. in your response, the letter w should appear at least 4 times.  

<<the average speed is total distance divided by time>> <<the total distance is the integral of v(t) from 0 to 5>> <<the average speed is w(5) - w(0) divided by 5>> <<the average speed is w(5) - w(0) divided by 5>>
